name: costaff-agent-wrenai
description: [Specialty] End-to-end natural-language Business Intelligence over a self-hosted WrenAI GenBI deployment — single agent owns ask + execute + explain + chart. [Capability] One-shot `wrenai_answer(question)` runs ask → execute against the project's data source via wren-ui GraphQL → natural-language answer (+ optional Vega-Lite chart) in a single tool call; lower-level tools (`wrenai_ask`, `wrenai_execute_sql`, `wrenai_explain_result`, `wrenai_make_chart`) are also exposed for granular control. Accumulates few-shot SQL-pairs and domain instructions into WrenAI's qdrant index. Health probe reports HTTP + MDL prep status. [Constraint] Bound to ONE mdl_hash + project_id pair per deployment (set at agent add time); switching schemas requires redeploy. Execution row count is hard-capped by WRENAI_EXEC_ROW_LIMIT (default 1000) to protect downstream LLM context. Typical end-to-end answer < 60s. Free WrenAI OSS only — no Cloud account needed. [Output] For `wrenai_answer`: natural-language answer + the executed SQL + retrieved tables + rows. For granular tools: SQL only / rows only / explanation only / chart spec only.
